briefs.title: Lottery Marketing Rules Tighten in BC: New Ad and Promotion Standards Take Effect April 2026
briefs.summary: BC is introducing new rules on how lottery schemes can be marketed, advertised, and promoted, including limits on direct marketing (reaching customers by mail, text, email, or social media) and inducements (bonuses or rewards offered to get people to play).
briefs.action_required: Review your lottery or gaming-related marketing practices before April 13, 2026 to ensure they meet the new rules.

key_dates.label: BC Lottery Scheme Marketing, Advertising and Promotion Regulation takes effect
